cves.description: Microsoft Streaming Service contains an untrusted pointer dereference vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation, enabling a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-21]

cves.name: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker with network access to the management interface to create a new, administrator-level account on affected devices. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-29]

cves.name: Cisco ASA and FTD Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.affected: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
cves.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain an information disclosure vulnerability. An attacker could retrieve memory contents on an affected device, which could lead to the disclosure of confidential information due to a buffer tracking issue when the software parses invalid URLs that are requested from the web services interface. This vulnerability affects only specific AnyConnect and WebVPN configurations. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Exchange Server Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Internet Shortcut Files Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Internet Shortcut Files contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for a security feature bypass. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-05]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass the SmartScreen user experience and inject code to potentially gain code execution, which could lead to some data exposure, lack of system availability, or both. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-05]

cves.name: Roundcube Webmail Persistent Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Roundcube Webmail contains a persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that can lead to information disclosure via malicious link references in plain/text messages. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-03-04]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-27]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS contain a time-of-check/time-of-use (TOCTOU) memory corruption vulnerability that allows an attacker with read and write capabilities to bypass Pointer Authentication. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-21]

cves.name: Ivanti Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and Neurons Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability
cves.affected: Connect Secure, Policy Secure, and Neurons
cves.description: Ivanti Connect Secure (ICS, formerly known as Pulse Connect Secure), Ivanti Policy Secure, and Ivanti Neurons contain a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the SAML component that allows an attacker to access certain restricted resources without authentication. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-02]

cves.name: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server Template Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server contain an unauthenticated OGNL template injection vulnerability that can lead to remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-14]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and Safari WebKit contain a type confusion vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-13]

cves.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) and MobileIron Core Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.affected: Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) and MobileIron Core
cves.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) and MobileIron Core contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthorized users to access restricted functionality or resources of the application. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-08]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Memory Access Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains an out-of-bounds memory access vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-07]

cves.name: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway contain a buffer overflow vulnerability that allows for a denial-of-service when configured as a Gateway (VPN virtual server, ICA Proxy, CVPN, RDP Proxy) or AAA virtual server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-07]

cves.name: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Code Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway contain a code injection vulnerability that allows for authenticated remote code execution on the management interface with access to NSIP, CLIP, or SNIP. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-24]

cves.name: Laravel Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Laravel Framework contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability, allowing for remote command execution. This vulnerability may only be exploited if a malicious user has accessed the application encryption key (APP_KEY environment variable). [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-02-06]

cves.name: Microsoft SharePoint Server Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker, who has gained access to spoofed JWT authentication tokens, to use them for executing a network attack. This attack bypasses authentication, enabling the attacker to gain administrator privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-31]

cves.name: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Ivanti Connect Secure (ICS, formerly known as Pulse Connect Secure) and Ivanti Policy Secure gateways contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in the web component that allows an attacker to access restricted resources by bypassing control checks. This vulnerability can be leveraged in conjunction with CVE-2024-21887, a command injection vulnerability. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-22]

cves.name: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Ivanti Connect Secure (ICS, formerly known as Pulse Connect Secure) and Ivanti Policy Secure contain a command injection vulnerability in the web components of these products, which can allow an authenticated administrator to send crafted requests to execute code on affected appliances. This vulnerability can be leveraged in conjunction with CVE-2023-46805, an authenticated bypass issue. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-22]

cves.name: Joomla! Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Joomla! contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows unauthorized access to webservice endpoints. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: D-Link DSL-2750B Devices Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: D-Link DSL-2750B devices contain a command injection vulnerability that allows remote, unauthenticated command injection via the login.cgi cli parameter. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for code execution when processing a font file. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: Apache Superset Insecure Default Initialization of Resource Vulnerability
cves.description: Apache Superset contains an insecure default initialization of a resource vulnerability that allows an attacker to authenticate and access unauthorized resources on installations that have not altered the default configured SECRET_KEY according to installation instructions. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-29]

cves.name: Spreadsheet::ParseExcel Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Spreadsheet::ParseExcel contains a remote code execution vulnerability due to passing unvalidated input from a file into a string-type “eval”. Specifically, the issue stems from the evaluation of Number format strings within the Excel parsing logic. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-23]

cves.name: Google Chromium WebRTC Heap Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium WebRTC, an open-source project providing web browsers with real-time communication, contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could impact web browsers using WebRTC, including but not limited to Google Chrome. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-23]

cves.name: FXC AE1021, AE1021PE OS Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: FXC AE1021 and AE1021PE contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows authenticated users to execute commands via a network. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-11]

cves.name: QNAP VioStor NVR OS Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: QNAP VioStar NVR contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows authenticated users to execute commands via a network. [CISA KEV - Due: 2024-01-11]

cves.name: Unitronics Vision PLC and HMI Insecure Default Password Vulnerability
cves.description: Unitronics Vision Series PLCs and HMIs ship with an insecure default password, which if left unchanged, can allow attackers to execute remote commands. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-18]

cves.name: Qlik Sense Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: Qlik Sense contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to create an anonymous session by sending maliciously crafted HTTP requests. This anonymous session could allow the attacker to send further requests to unauthorized endpoints. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-28]

cves.name: Qlik Sense HTTP Tunneling Vulnerability
cves.description: Qlik Sense contains an HTTP tunneling vulnerability that allows an attacker to escalate privileges and execute HTTP requests on the backend server hosting the software. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-28]

cves.name: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Integer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Qualcomm chipsets contain an integer overflow vulnerability due to memory corruption in Graphics Linux while assigning shared virtual memory region during IOCTL call. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-26]

cves.name: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Use of Out-of-Range Pointer Offset Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Qualcomm chipsets contain a use of out-of-range pointer offset vulnerability due to memory corruption in Graphics while submitting a large list of sync points in an AUX command to the IOCTL_KGSL_GPU_AUX_COMMAND. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-26]

cves.name: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Qualcomm chipsets contain a use-after-free vulnerability due to memory corruption in DSP Services during a remote call from HLOS to DSP. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-26]

cves.name: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Qualcomm chipsets contain a use-after-free vulnerability when process shell memory is freed using IOCTL munmap call and process initialization is in progress. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-26]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Memory Corruption Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain a memory corruption vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-25]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that may disclose sensitive information when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-25]

cves.name: Google Skia Integer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium Skia contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker, who has compromised the renderer process, to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a malicious file. This vulnerability affects Google Chrome and ChromeOS, Android, Flutter, and possibly other products. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-21]

cves.name: ownCloud graphapi Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: ownCloud graphapi contains an information disclosure vulnerability that can reveal sensitive data stored in phpinfo() via GetPhpInfo.php, including administrative credentials. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-21]

cves.name: GNU C Library Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: GNU C Library's dynamic loader ld.so contains a buffer overflow vulnerability when processing the GLIBC_TUNABLES environment variable, allowing a local attacker to execute code with elevated privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-12]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) contains a security feature bypass vulnerability resulting in a limited loss of integrity and availability of security features. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-07]

cves.name: Sophos Web Appliance Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Sophos Web Appliance contains a command injection vulnerability in the warn-proceed handler that allows for remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-07]

cves.name: Oracle Fusion Middleware Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Oracle Fusion Middleware contains an unspecified vulnerability in the WLS Core Components that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via IIOP to compromise the WebLogic Server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Desktop Window Manager (DWM) Core Library Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Desktop Window Manager (DWM) Core Library contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-05]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that could allow an attacker to bypass Windows Defender SmartScreen checks and their associated prompts. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-05]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-05]

cves.name: SysAid Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: SysAid Server (on-premises version) contains a path traversal vulnerability that leads to code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-12-04]

cves.name: Juniper Junos OS EX Series PHP External Variable Modification Vulnerability
cves.description: Juniper Junos OS on EX Series contains a PHP external variable modification vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, network-based attacker to control certain, important environment variables. Using a crafted request an attacker is able to modify certain PHP environment variables, leading to partial loss of integrity, which may allow chaining to other vulnerabilities. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-17]

cves.name: Juniper Junos OS EX Series and SRX Series PHP External Variable Modification Vulnerability
cves.description: Juniper Junos OS on EX Series and SRX Series contains a PHP external variable modification vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, network-based attacker to control an important environment variable. Using a crafted request, which sets the variable PHPRC, an attacker is able to modify the PHP execution environment allowing the injection und execution of code. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-17]

cves.name: Juniper Junos OS SRX Series Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
cves.description: Juniper Junos OS on SRX Series contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, network-based attacker to cause limited impact to the file system integrity. With a specific request to user.php that doesn't require authentication, an attacker is able to upload arbitrary files via J-Web, leading to a loss of integrity for a certain part of the file system, which may allow chaining to other vulnerabilities. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-17]

cves.name: Juniper Junos OS EX Series Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
cves.description: Juniper Junos OS on EX Series contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, network-based attacker to cause limited impact to the file system integrity. With a specific request to installAppPackage.php that doesn't require authentication, an attacker is able to upload arbitrary files via J-Web, leading to a loss of integrity for a certain part of the file system, which may allow chaining to other vulnerabilities. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-17]

cves.name: Juniper Junos OS SRX Series Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
cves.description: Juniper Junos OS on SRX Series contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, network-based attacker to cause limited impact to the file system integrity. With a specific request to webauth_operation.php that doesn't require authentication, an attacker is able to upload arbitrary files via J-Web, leading to a loss of integrity for a certain part of the file system, which may allow chaining to other vulnerabilities. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-17]

cves.name: Service Location Protocol (SLP) Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
cves.description: The Service Location Protocol (SLP) contains a denial-of-service (DoS) vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to register services and use spoofed UDP traffic to conduct a denial-of-service (DoS) attack with a significant amplification factor. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-29]

cves.name: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server Improper Authorization Vulnerability
cves.description: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server contain an improper authorization vulnerability that can result in significant data loss when exploited by an unauthenticated attacker. There is no impact on confidentiality since the attacker cannot exfiltrate any data. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-28]

cves.name: Apache ActiveMQ Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Apache ActiveMQ contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that may allow a remote attacker with network access to a broker to run shell commands by manipulating serialized class types in the OpenWire protocol to cause the broker to instantiate any class on the classpath. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-23]

cves.name: F5 BIG-IP Configuration Utility SQL Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: F5 BIG-IP Configuration utility contains an SQL injection vulnerability that may allow an authenticated attacker with network access through the BIG-IP management port and/or self IP addresses to execute system commands. This vulnerability can be used in conjunction with CVE-2023-46747. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-21]

cves.name: F5 BIG-IP Configuration Utility Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: F5 BIG-IP Configuration utility contains an authentication bypass using an alternate path or channel vulnerability due to undisclosed requests that may allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access to the BIG-IP system through the management port and/or self IP addresses to execute system commands. This vulnerability can be used in conjunction with CVE-2023-46748. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-21]

cves.name: Roundcube Webmail Persistent Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Roundcube Webmail contains a persistent cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to run malicious JavaScript code. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-16]

cves.name: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco IOS XE contains a command injection vulnerability in the web user interface. When chained with CVE-2023-20198, the attacker can leverage the new local user to elevate privilege to root and write the implant to the file system. Cisco identified CVE-2023-20273 as the vulnerability exploited to deploy the implant. CVE-2021-1435, previously associated with the exploitation events, is no longer believed to be related to this activity. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-27]

cves.name: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway contain a buffer overflow vulnerability that allows for sensitive information disclosure when configured as a Gateway (VPN virtual server, ICA Proxy, CVPN, RDP Proxy) or AAA virtual server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-11-08]

cves.name: Cisco IOS XE Web UI Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco IOS XE Web UI contains a privilege escalation vulnerability in the web user interface that could allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to create an account with privilege level 15 access. The attacker can then use that account to gain control of the affected device. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-20]

cves.name: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Group Encrypted Transport VPN Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco IOS and IOS XE contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the Group Encrypted Transport VPN (GET VPN) feature that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker who has administrative control of either a group member or a key server to execute malicious code or cause a device to crash. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-31]

cves.name: Microsoft Skype for Business Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Skype for Business contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-31]

cves.name: Microsoft WordPad Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft WordPad contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for information disclosure. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-31]

cves.name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack Vulnerability
cves.description: HTTP/2 contains a rapid reset vulnerability that allows for a distributed denial-of-service attack (DDoS). [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-31]

cves.name: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server Broken Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Atlassian Confluence Data Center and Server contains a broken access control vulnerability that allows an attacker to create unauthorized Confluence administrator accounts and access Confluence. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-13]

cves.name: Progress WS_FTP Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Progress WS_FTP Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in the Ad Hoc Transfer module that allows an authenticated attacker to execute remote commands on the underlying operating system. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-26]

cves.name: Apple iOS and iPadOS Kernel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS and iPadOS contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for local privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-26]

cves.name: JetBrains TeamCity Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: JetBrains TeamCity contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows for remote code execution on TeamCity Server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-25]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows CNG Key Isolation Service Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Cryptographic Next Generation (CNG) Key Isolation Service contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain specific limited SYSTEM privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-25]

cves.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a local, non-privileged user to make improper GPU memory processing operations to gain access to already freed memory. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-24]

cves.name: Google Chromium libvpx Heap Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium libvpx contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability in vp8 encoding that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could impact web browsers using libvpx, including but not limited to Google Chrome. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-23]

cves.name: Red Hat JBoss RichFaces Framework Expression Language Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Red Hat JBoss RichFaces Framework contains an expression language injection vulnerability via the UserResource resource. A remote, unauthenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability to execute malicious code using a chain of Java serialized objects via org.ajax4jsf.resource.UserResource$UriData. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-19]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Improper Certificate Validation Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS contain an improper certificate validation vulnerability that can allow a malicious app to bypass signature validation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-16]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Kernel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for local privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-16]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain an unspecified vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-16]

cves.name: Trend Micro Apex One and Worry-Free Business Security Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.affected: Apex One and Worry-Free Business Security
cves.description: Trend Micro Apex One and Worry-Free Business Security contain an unspecified vulnerability in the third-party anti-virus uninstaller that could allow an attacker to manipulate the module to conduct remote code execution. An attacker must first obtain administrative console access on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-12]

cves.name: MinIO Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: MinIO contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to use crafted requests to bypass metadata bucket name checking and put an object into any bucket while processing `PostPolicyBucket` to conduct privilege escalation. To carry out this attack, the attacker requires credentials with `arn:aws:s3:::*` permission, as well as enabled Console API access. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-10]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung devices with selected Exynos chipsets contain a use-after-free vulnerability that allows malicious memory write and code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-09]

cves.name: Realtek SDK Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
cves.description: Realtek SDK contains an improper input validation vulnerability in the miniigd SOAP service that allows remote attackers to execute malicious code via a crafted NewInternalClient request. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-09]

cves.name: Zyxel EMG2926 Routers Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Zyxel EMG2926 routers contain a command injection vulnerability located in the diagnostic tools, specifically the nslookup function. A malicious user may exploit numerous vectors to execute malicious commands on the router, such as the ping_ip parameter to the expert/maintenance/diagnostic/nslookup URI. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-09]

cves.name: Laravel Ignition File Upload Vulnerability
cves.description: Laravel Ignition contains a file upload vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to execute malicious code due to insecure usage of file_get_contents() and file_put_contents(). [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-09]

cves.name: Android Framework Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Android Framework contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-04]

cves.name: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance and Firepower Threat Defense Unauthorized Access Vulnerability
cves.affected: Adaptive Security Appliance and Firepower Threat Defense
cves.description: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance and Firepower Threat Defense contain an unauthorized access vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to conduct a brute force attack in an attempt to identify valid username and password combinations or establish a clientless SSL VPN session with an unauthorized user. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-04]

cves.name: Google Chromium WebP Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium WebP contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to perform an out-of-bounds memory write via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability can affect applications that use the WebP Codec. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-04]

cves.name: Microsoft Word Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Word contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for information disclosure. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-03]

cves.name: Microsoft Streaming Service Proxy Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Streaming Service Proxy contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-03]

cves.name: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS ImageIO Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS contain a buffer overflow vulnerability in ImageIO when processing a maliciously crafted image, which may lead to code execution. This vulnerability was chained with CVE-2023-41061. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-02]

cves.name: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS Wallet Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS contain an unspecified vulnerability due to a validation issue affecting Wallet in which a maliciously crafted attachment may result in code execution. This vulnerability was chained with CVE-2023-41064. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-10-02]

cves.name: Apache RocketMQ Command Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Several components of Apache RocketMQ, including NameServer, Broker, and Controller, are exposed to the extranet and lack permission verification. An attacker can exploit this vulnerability by using the update configuration function to execute commands as the system users that RocketMQ is running as or achieve the same effect by forging the RocketMQ protocol content. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-27]

cves.name: Ignite Realtime Openfire Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: Ignite Realtime Openfire contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to access restricted pages in the Openfire Admin Console reserved for administrative users. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-14]

cves.name: Ivanti Sentry Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Ivanti Sentry, formerly known as MobileIron Sentry, contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that may allow an attacker to bypass authentication controls on the administrative interface due to an insufficiently restrictive Apache HTTPD configuration. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-12]

cves.name: Veeam Backup & Replication Cloud Connect Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
cves.description: Veeam Backup & Replication Cloud Connect component contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated user operating within the backup infrastructure network perimeter to obtain encrypted credentials stored in the configuration database. This may lead to an attacker gaining access to the backup infrastructure hosts. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-12]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could result in code execution in the context of the current user. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-11]

cves.name: Citrix Content Collaboration ShareFile Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix Content Collaboration contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to remotely compromise customer-managed ShareFile storage zones controllers. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-09-06]

cves.name: Microsoft .NET Core and Visual Studio Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft .NET Core and Visual Studio contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for denial-of-service (DoS). [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-30]

cves.name: Zyxel P660HN-T1A Routers Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Zyxel P660HN-T1A routers contain a command injection vulnerability in the Remote System Log forwarding function, which is accessible by an unauthenticated user and exploited via the remote_host parameter of the ViewLog.asp page. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-28]

cves.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains a path traversal vulnerability that enables an authenticated administrator to perform malicious file writes to the EPMM server. This vulnerability can be used in conjunction with CVE-2023-35078 to bypass authentication and ACLs restrictions (if applicable). [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-21]

cves.name: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability impacting the confidentiality and integrity of data. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-17]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Kernel Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS contain an unspecified vulnerability allowing an app to modify a sensitive kernel state. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-16]

cves.name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM, previously branded MobileIron Core) contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthenticated access to specific API paths. An attacker with access to these API paths can access personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, phone numbers, and other mobile device details for users on a vulnerable system. An attacker can also make other configuration changes including installing software and modifying security profiles on registered devices. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-15]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows for a security feature bypass. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-10]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains an improper access control vulnerability that allows for a security feature bypass. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-10]

cves.name: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway Code Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway contains a code injection vulnerability that allows for unauthenticated remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-09]

cves.name: SolarView Compact Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: SolarView Compact contains a command injection vulnerability due to improper validation of input values on the send test mail console of the product's web server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-03]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain an unspecified vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-03]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows MSHTML Platform contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-01]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Defender SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Defender SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass the Open File - Security Warning prompt. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-01]

cves.name: Microsoft Outlook Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Outlook contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to bypass the Microsoft Outlook Security Notice prompt. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-01]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Error Reporting Service Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Error Reporting Service contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-01]

cves.name: Netwrix Auditor Insecure Object Deserialization Vulnerability
cves.description: Netwrix Auditor User Activity Video Recording component contains an insecure objection deserialization vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute code as the NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM user. Successful exploitation requires that the attacker is able to reach port 9004/TCP, which is commonly blocked by standard enterprise firewalling. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-08-01]

cves.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that may allow a non-privileged user to gain root privilege and/or disclose information. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-28]

cves.name: D-Link DIR-859 Router Command Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: D-Link DIR-859 router contains a command execution vulnerability in the UPnP endpoint URL, /gena.cgi. Exploitation allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute system commands as root by sending a specially crafted HTTP SUBSCRIBE request to the UPnP service when connecting to the local network. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: D-Link DWL-2600AP Access Point Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: D-Link DWL-2600AP access point contains an authenticated command injection vulnerability via the Save Configuration functionality in the Web interface, using shell metacharacters in the admin.cgi?action=config_save configBackup or downloadServerip parameter. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain an out-of-bounds read vulnerability within the modem interface driver due to a lack of boundary checking of a buffer in set_skb_priv(), leading to remote code execution by dereference of an invalid function pointer. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain an improper input validation vulnerability within the modem interface driver that results in a format string bug leading to kernel panic. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Race Condition Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain a race condition vulnerability within the MFC charger driver that leads to a use-after-free allowing for a write given a radio privilege is compromised. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Race Condition Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain a race condition vulnerability within the MFC charger driver that leads to a use-after-free allowing for a write given a radio privilege is compromised. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain an unspecified vulnerability within DSP driver that allows attackers to load ELF libraries inside DSP. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Improper Boundary Check Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain an improper boundary check vulnerability within DSP driver that allows for out-of-bounds memory access. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-20]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products Integer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS. iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS contain an integer overflow vulnerability that could allow an application to execute code with kernel privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-14]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Memory Corruption Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain a memory corruption vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-14]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain a type confusion vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-14]

cves.name: VMware Tools Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: VMware Tools contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the vgauth module. A fully compromised ESXi host can force VMware Tools to fail to authenticate host-to-guest operations, impacting the confidentiality and integrity of the guest virtual machine. An attacker must have root access over ESXi to exploit this vulnerability. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-14]

cves.name: Zyxel Multiple NAS Devices Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Zyxel network-attached storage (NAS) devices contain a pre-authentication command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute commands remotely via a crafted HTTP request. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-14]

cves.name: Vmware Aria Operations for Networks Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: VMware Aria Operations for Networks (formerly vRealize Network Insight) contains a command injection vulnerability that allows a malicious actor with network access to perform an attack resulting in remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Roundcube Webmail Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Roundcube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows an attacker to send a plain text e-mail message with Javascript in a link reference element that is mishandled by linkref_addinindex in rcube_string_replacer.php. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Roundcube Webmail Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Roundcube Webmail contains an remote code execution vulnerability that allows attackers to execute code via shell metacharacters in a configuration setting for im_convert_path or im_identify_path. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Roundcube Webmail SQL Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Roundcube Webmail is vulnerable to SQL injection via search or search_params. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Mozilla Firefox, Firefox ESR, and Thunderbird Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Mozilla Firefox, Firefox ESR, and Thunderbird contain a use-after-free vulnerability in SVG Animation, targeting Firefox and Tor browser users on Windows. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Win32k contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-07-13]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-28]

cves.name: Zyxel Multiple Firewalls Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Zyxel ATP, USG FLEX, USG FLEX 50(W), USG20(W)-VPN, VPN, and ZyWALL/USG firewalls contain a buffer overflow vulnerability in the notification function that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to cause denial-of-service (DoS) conditions and remote code execution on an affected device. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-26]

cves.name: Zyxel Multiple Firewalls Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Zyxel ATP, USG FLEX, USG FLEX 50(W), USG20(W)-VPN, VPN, and ZyWALL/USG firewalls contain a buffer overflow vulnerability in the ID processing function that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to cause denial-of-service (DoS) conditions and remote code execution on an affected device. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-26]

cves.name: Progress MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Progress MOVEit Transfer contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain unauthorized access to MOVEit Transfer's database. Depending on the database engine being used (MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, or Azure SQL), an attacker may be able to infer information about the structure and contents of the database in addition to executing SQL statements that alter or delete database elements. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-23]

cves.name: Zyxel Multiple Firewalls OS Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Zyxel ATP, USG FLEX, VPN, and ZyWALL/USG firewalls allow for improper error message handling which could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute OS commands remotely by sending crafted packets to an affected device. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-21]

cves.name: Barracuda Networks ESG Appliance Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
cves.description: Barracuda Email Security Gateway (ESG) appliance contains an improper input validation vulnerability of a user-supplied .tar file, leading to remote command injection. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-16]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Sandbox Escape Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and Safari WebKit contain an unspecified vulnerability that can allow a remote attacker to break out of the Web Content sandbox. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-12]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and Safari WebKit contain an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that may disclose sensitive information when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-12]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and Safari WebKit contain a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-12]

cves.name: Cisco IOS Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco IOS contains an unspecified vulnerability that may block further telnet, reverse telnet, Remote Shell (RSH), Secure Shell (SSH), and in some cases, Hypertext Transport Protocol (HTTP) access to the Cisco device. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-09]

cves.name: Cisco IOS, IOS XR, and IOS XE IKEv1 Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.affected: IOS, IOS XR, and IOS XE
cves.description: Cisco IOS, IOS XR, and IOS XE contain insufficient condition checks in the part of the code that handles Internet Key Exchange version 1 (IKEv1) security negotiation requests. contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the Internet Key Exchange version 1 (IKEv1) that could allow an attacker to retrieve memory contents. Successful exploitation could allow the attacker to retrieve memory contents, which can lead to information disclosure. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-09]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Log File Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices running Android 11, 12, and 13 contain an insertion of sensitive information into log file vulnerability that allows a privileged, local attacker to conduct an address space layout randomization (ASLR) bypass. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-09]

cves.name: Multiple Ruckus Wireless Products CSRF and RCE Vulnerability
cves.description: Ruckus Wireless Access Point (AP) software contains an unspecified vulnerability in the web services component. If the web services component is enabled on the AP, an attacker can perform cross-site request forgery (CSRF) or remote code execution (RCE). This vulnerability impacts Ruckus ZoneDirector, SmartZone, and Solo APs. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Red Hat Polkit Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability
cves.description: Red Hat Polkit contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability through the bypassing of credential checks for D-Bus requests, allowing for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Linux Kernel Race Condition Vulnerability
cves.description: Linux Kernel contains a race condition vulnerability within the n_tty_write function that allows local users to cause a denial-of-service (DoS) or gain privileges via read and write operations with long strings. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Linux Kernel Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
cves.description: Linux Kernel contains an improper input validation vulnerability in the Reliable Datagram Sockets (RDS) protocol implementation that allows local users to gain privileges via crafted use of the sendmsg and recvmsg system calls. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Jenkins User Interface (UI) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: Jenkins User Interface (UI) contains an information disclosure vulnerability that allows users to see the names of jobs and builds otherwise inaccessible to them on the "Fingerprints" pages. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Oracle Java SE and JRockit Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Oracle Java SE and JRockit contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows remote attackers to affect confidentiality, integrity, and availability via vectors related to Java Management Extensions (JMX). This vulnerability can be exploited through sandboxed Java Web Start applications and sandboxed Java applets. It can also be exploited by supplying data to APIs in the specified component without using sandboxed Java Web Start applications or sandboxed Java applets, such as through a web service. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Apache Tomcat Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Apache Tomcat contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution if JmxRemoteLifecycleListener is used and an attacker can reach Java Management Extension (JMX) ports. This CVE exists because this listener wasn't updated for consistency with the Oracle patched issues for CVE-2016-3427 which affected credential types. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-06-02]

cves.name: Microsoft Win32K Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Win32k contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation up to SYSTEM privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-30]

cves.name: TP-Link Archer AX-21 Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: TP-Link Archer AX-21 contains a command injection vulnerability that allows for remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-22]

cves.name: Apache Log4j2 Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Apache Log4j2 contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability due to the incomplete fix of CVE-2021-44228, where the Thread Context Lookup Pattern is vulnerable to remote code execution in certain non-default configurations. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-22]

cves.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Oracle WebLogic Server contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via T3, IIOP, to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-22]

cves.name: MinIO Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: MinIO contains a vulnerability in a cluster deployment where MinIO returns all environment variables, which allows for information disclosure. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-12]

cves.name: PaperCut MF/NG Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: PaperCut MF/NG contains an improper access control vulnerability within the SetupCompleted class that allows authentication bypass and code execution in the context of system. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-12]

cves.name: Google Chrome Skia Integer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium Skia contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker, who has compromised the renderer process, to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability affects Google Chrome and ChromeOS, Android, Flutter, and possibly other products. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-12]

cves.name: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software SNMP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE contains a vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to remotely execute code on an affected system or cause an affected system to reload. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-10]

cves.name: Apple macOS Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple macOS contains a use-after-free vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-08]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-08]

cves.name: Android Framework Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Android Framework contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation after updating an app to a higher Target SDK with no additional execution privileges needed. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-04]

cves.name: Novi Survey Insecure Deserialization Vulnerability
cves.description: Novi Survey contains an insecure deserialization vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute code on the server in the context of the service account. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-04]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) driver contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-02]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Safari WebKit contain a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-01]

cves.name: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS IOSurfaceAccelerator Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS IOSurfaceAccelerator contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that allows an app to execute code with kernel privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-05-01]

cves.name: Veritas Backup Exec Agent File Access Vulnerability
cves.description: Veritas Backup Exec (BE) Agent contains a file access vulnerability that could allow an attacker to specially craft input parameters on a data management protocol command to access files on the BE Agent machine. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-28]

cves.name: Veritas Backup Exec Agent Improper Authentication Vulnerability
cves.description: Veritas Backup Exec (BE) Agent contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow an attacker unauthorized access to the BE Agent via SHA authentication scheme. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-28]

cves.name: Veritas Backup Exec Agent Command Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Veritas Backup Exec (BE) Agent contains a command execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to use a data management protocol command to execute a command on the BE Agent machine. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-28]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Certificate Dialog Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Certificate Dialog contains a privilege escalation vulnerability, allowing attackers to run processes in an elevated context. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-28]

cves.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver contains an information disclosure vulnerability that allows a non-privileged user to make valid GPU processing operations that expose sensitive kernel metadata. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-28]

cves.name: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability by allowing an endpoint URL to accept parameters without sanitizing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-24]

cves.name: Microsoft Internet Explorer Memory Corruption Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains a memory corruption vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute code or cause a denial of service via a crafted website. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Samba Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Samba contains a remote code execution vulnerability, allowing a malicious client to upload a shared library to a writable share and then cause the server to load and execute it. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Fortra Cobalt Strike User Interface Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Fortra Cobalt Strike User Interface contains an unspecified vulnerability rooted in Java Swing that may allow remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Fortra Cobalt Strike Teamserver Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
cves.description: Fortra Cobalt Strike contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Teamserver that would allow an attacker to set a malformed username in the Beacon configuration, allowing them to execute code remotely. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple GPU drivers, included in iOS, iPadOS, and macOS, contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that may allow a malicious application to execute code with kernel privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that may allow a non-privileged user to gain root privilege and/or disclose information. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Linux Kernel Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Linux kernel contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation to gain ring0 access from the system user. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Google Chromium Network Service Use-After-Free Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium Network Service contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Arm Mali GPU Kernel Driver contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows a non-privileged user to achieve write access to read-only memory pages. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-20]

cves.name: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
cves.description: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-05]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that could allow an attacker to evade Mark of the Web (MOTW) defenses via a specially crafted malicious file. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-04]

cves.name: Fortinet FortiOS Path Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: Fortinet FortiOS contains a path traversal vulnerability that may allow a local privileged attacker to read and write files via crafted CLI commands. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-04-04]

cves.name: XStream Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: XStream contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows an attacker to manipulate the processed input stream and replace or inject objects that result in the execution of a local command on the server. This vulnerability can affect multiple products, including but not limited to VMware Cloud Foundation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-31]

cves.name: Plex Media Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Plex Media Server contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows an attacker with access to the server administrator's Plex account to upload a malicious file via the Camera Upload feature and have the media server execute it. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-31]

cves.name: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus contains an unspecified vulnerability allowing for remote code execution when performing a password change or reset. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-28]

cves.name: Apache Spark Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Apache Spark contains a command injection vulnerability via Spark User Interface (UI) when Access Control Lists (ACLs) are enabled. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-28]

cves.name: Teclib GLPI Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Teclib GLPI contains a remote code execution vulnerability in the third-party library, htmlawed. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-28]

cves.name: ZK Framework AuUploader Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: ZK Framework AuUploader servlets contain an unspecified vulnerability that could allow an attacker to retrieve the content of a file located in the web context. The ZK Framework is an open-source Java framework. This vulnerability can impact multiple products, including but not limited to ConnectWise R1Soft Server Backup Manager. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-20]

cves.name: IBM Aspera Faspex Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: IBM Aspera Faspex could allow a remote attacker to execute code on the system, caused by a YAML deserialization flaw. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-14]

cves.name: Mitel MiVoice Connect Code Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: The Director component in Mitel MiVoice Connect allows an authenticated attacker with internal network access to execute code within the context of the application. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-14]

cves.name: Mitel MiVoice Connect Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: The Mitel Edge Gateway component of MiVoice Connect allows an authenticated attacker with internal network access to execute commands within the context of the system. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-14]

cves.name: Cacti Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: Cacti contains a command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated user to execute code. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-09]

cves.name: Microsoft Office Publisher Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Office Publisher contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that allows for a local, authenticated attack on a targeted system. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) Driver Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System (CLFS) driver contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-07]

cves.name: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS, MacOS, Safari and iPadOS WebKit contain a type confusion vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Graphic Component Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Graphic Component contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-07]

cves.name: Intel Ethernet Diagnostics Driver for Windows Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
cves.description: Intel ethernet diagnostics driver for Windows IQVW32.sys and IQVW64.sys contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for a denial-of-service (DoS). [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-03]

cves.name: TerraMaster OS Remote Command Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: TerraMaster OS contains a remote command execution vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated user to execute commands on the target endpoint. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-03]

cves.name: Fortra GoAnywhere MFT Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Fortra (formerly, HelpSystems) GoAnywhere MFT contains a pre-authentication remote code execution vulnerability in the License Response Servlet due to deserializing an attacker-controlled object. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-03-03]

cves.name: Oracle E-Business Suite Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Oracle E-Business Suite contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Web Applications Desktop Integrator. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-02-23]

cves.name: Multiple SugarCRM Products Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple SugarCRM products contain a remote code execution vulnerability in the EmailTemplates. Using a specially crafted request, custom PHP code can be injected through the EmailTemplates. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-02-23]

cves.name: Telerik UI for ASP.NET AJAX Insecure Direct Object Reference Vulnerability
cves.description: Telerik UI for ASP.NET AJAX contains an insecure direct object reference vulnerability in RadAsyncUpload that can result in file uploads in a limited location and/or remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-02-16]

cves.name: Zoho ManageEngine Multiple Products Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple Zoho ManageEngine products contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability due to the usage of an outdated third-party dependency, Apache Santuario. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-02-13]

cves.name: CWP Control Web Panel OS Command Injection Vulnerability
cves.description: CWP Control Web Panel (formerly CentOS Web Panel) contains an OS command injection vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute commands via shell metacharacters in the login parameter. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-02-07]

cves.name: Microsoft Exchange Server Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. This vulnerability is chainable with CVE-2022-41082, which allows for remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-31]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Advanced Local Procedure Call (ALPC) Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Advanced Local Procedure Call (ALPC) contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-31]

cves.name: TIBCO JasperReports Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability
cves.description: TIBCO JasperReports Server contain a vulnerability which may allow any authenticated user read-only access to the contents of the web application, including key configuration files. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-19]

cves.name: TIBCO JasperReports Library Directory Traversal Vulnerability
cves.description: TIBCO JasperReports Library contains a directory-traversal vulnerability that may allow web server users to access contents of the host system. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-19]

cves.name: Apple iOS Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS contains a type confusion vulnerability when processing maliciously crafted web content leading to code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-04]

cves.name: Fortinet FortiOS Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Multiple versions of Fortinet FortiOS SSL-VPN contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability which can allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code or commands via specifically crafted requests. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-03]

cves.name: Microsoft Defender SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Defender SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass vulnerability that could allow an attacker to evade Mark of the Web (MOTW) defenses via a specially crafted malicious file. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-03]

cves.name: Citrix Application Delivery Controller (ADC) and Gateway Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Citrix Application Delivery Controller (ADC) and Gateway, when configured with SAML SP or IdP configuration, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows an attacker to execute code as administrator. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-03]

cves.name: Veeam Backup & Replication Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: The Veeam Distribution Service in the Backup & Replication application allows unauthenticated users to access internal API functions. A remote attacker can send input to the internal API which may lead to uploading and executing of malicious code. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-03]

cves.name: Veeam Backup & Replication Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: The Veeam Distribution Service in the Backup & Replication application allows unauthenticated users to access internal API functions. A remote attacker can send input to the internal API which may lead to uploading and executing of malicious code. [CISA KEV - Due: 2023-01-03]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-26]

cves.name: Oracle Fusion Middleware Unspecified Vulnerability
cves.description: Oracle Fusion Middleware Access Manager allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to takeover the Access Manager product. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-19]

cves.name: Google Chromium GPU Heap Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium GPU contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability that allows a remote attacker, who has compromised the renderer process, to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-19]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) contains a security feature bypass vulnerability resulting in a limited loss of integrity and availability of security features. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-09]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Mark of the Web (MOTW) contains a security feature bypass vulnerability resulting in a limited loss of integrity and availability of security features. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-09]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Print Spooler Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Print Spooler contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain SYSTEM-level privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-09]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows CNG Key Isolation Service Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows Cryptographic Next Generation (CNG) Key Isolation Service contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows an attacker to gain SYSTEM-level privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-09]

cves.name: Microsoft Windows Scripting Languages Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: Microsoft Windows contains an unspecified vulnerability in the JScript9 scripting language which allows for remote code execution. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-12-09]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices contain an improper access control vulnerability in clipboard service which allows untrusted applications to read or write arbitrary files. This vulnerability was chained with CVE-2021-25369 and CVE-2021-25370. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-29]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Improper Access Control Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices using Mali GPU contains an improper access control vulnerability in sec_log file. Exploitation of the vulnerability exposes sensitive kernel information to the userspace. This vulnerability was chained with CVE-2021-25337 and CVE-2021-25370. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-29]

cves.name: Samsung Mobile Devices Memory Corruption Vulnerability
cves.description: Samsung mobile devices using Mali GPU contain an incorrect implementation handling file descriptor in dpu driver. This incorrect implementation results in memory corruption, leading to kernel panic. This vulnerability was chained with CVE-2021-25337 and CVE-2021-25369. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-29]

cves.name: Google Chromium V8 Type Confusion Vulnerability
cves.description: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains a type confusion vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-18]

cves.name: Apple iOS and iPadOS Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
cves.description: Apple iOS and iPadOS kernel contain an out-of-bounds write vulnerability which can allow an application to perform code execution with kernel privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-15]

cves.name: Cisco AnyConnect Secure Mobility Client for Windows DLL Hijacking Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco AnyConnect Secure Mobility Client for Windows interprocess communication (IPC) channel allows for insufficient validation of resources that are loaded by the application at run time. An attacker with valid credentials on Windows could execute code on the affected machine with SYSTEM privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-14]

cves.name: Cisco AnyConnect Secure Mobility Client for Windows Uncontrolled Search Path Vulnerability
cves.description: Cisco AnyConnect Secure Mobility Client for Windows allows for incorrect handling of directory paths. An attacker with valid credentials on Windows would be able to copy malicious files to arbitrary locations with system level privileges. This could include DLL pre-loading, DLL hijacking, and other related attacks. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-14]

cves.name: GIGABYTE Multiple Products Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
cves.description: The GPCIDrv and GDrv low-level drivers in GIGABYTE App Center, AORUS Graphics Engine, XTREME Gaming Engine, and OC GURU expose functionality to read and write arbitrary physical memory. This could be leveraged by a local attacker to elevate privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-14]

cves.name: GIGABYTE Multiple Products Code Execution Vulnerability
cves.description: The GPCIDrv and GDrv low-level drivers in GIGABYTE App Center, AORUS Graphics Engine, XTREME Gaming Engine, and OC GURU II expose functionality to read/write data from/to IO ports. This could be leveraged in a number of ways to ultimately run code with elevated privileges. [CISA KEV - Due: 2022-11-14]

cves.name: GIGABYTE Multiple Products Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
